title: Cozy Creamy Tortilla Stir-fry
description: An earthy and creamy Argentinian dish featuring halal-friendly tortillas sautéed with aromatic vegetables in a rich cream sauce for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: Heavy Cream or Coconut Milk
ingredients.notes: Optionally, can use full-fat coconut milk for a creamy texture without dairy

instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic, sautéing until translucent (about 3 minutes).
Add bell peppers and spinach leaves to the skillet. Cook until vegetables soften (5-7 minutes).
Remove from heat, transfer mixture to a bowl, cover with aluminum foil to keep warm.
In the same pan, add tortillas, sprinkle on heavy cream or coconut milk, and stir-fry over medium-high heat for about 2-3 minutes until golden brown spots appear (do not overcook).
Fold in cooked vegetables back into tortilla mixture, reheat briefly if needed. Serve hot.
Optional garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro or parsley.
